meta_title: Ihe Ntụgharị Markdown gaa WhatsApp — Ngwa Ọnlaịn N'efu
meta_description: Tụgharịa Markdown gaa n'ụdị WhatsApp n'otu mado. Mee ka mmepụta ChatGPT na Claude bụrụ bold, italic, na ndepụta ndị na-apụta nke ọma na nkata WhatsApp. N'efu, enweghị ndebanye aha, ọ na-arụ ọrụ na browser gị.
og_image_alt: Whatdown — ihe ntụgharị Markdown gaa WhatsApp
sample:
# Nnwale Markdown → WhatsApp

Mado **Markdown** ọ bụla ma hụ otú ọ si apụta. Ụdị niile WhatsApp na-akwado dị na ihe atụ a:

- *Italic* nwere otu akara kpakpando
- **Bold** nwere akara kpakpando abụọ
- ~~Strikethrough~~ nwere tilde abụọ
- `code` dị n'ime ahịrị nwere backticks

Ọ bara uru maka ịkekọrịta mmepụta LLM nke ọma:

```
prompt: chịkọta PR a
output: ọ dị mma, zipụ ya
```

Docs na source dị na https://whatdown.lebaux.co
tagline: Mado Markdown sitere na ChatGPT, Claude, ma ọ bụ LLM ọ bụla. Detuo ederede e haziri maka WhatsApp nke na-apụta nke ọma na nkata — bold, italic, ndepụta, na code, na-enweghị akara kpakpando gbajiri agbaji.
intro_h2: Tụgharịa Markdown gaa n'ụdị WhatsApp n'otu mado
intro_p1: WhatsApp anaghị akwado Markdown nkịtị. Ịmado mmepụta sitere na ChatGPT, Claude, ma ọ bụ LLM ọ bụla ozugbo n'ime nkata na-ahapụ akara kpakpando a na-ahụ anya, bold gbajiri agbaji, na njikọ ndị a pụghị ịpị. Ihe ntụgharị a na-edegharị Markdown gaa n'ụdị WhatsApp na-aghọta n'ezie — otu akara kpakpando maka bold, otu underscore maka italic, tilde maka strikethrough, na code blocks ndị na-anọgide nke ọma mgbe a madochara ha.
intro_p2_before_link: Ọ na-arụ ọrụ kpamkpam n'ime browser gị. Enweghị ihe a na-ebulite, a na-edekọ, ma ọ bụ a na-echekwa. Ọ bụ open source na
howto_h2: Otu esi atụgharị Markdown gaa WhatsApp
howto_step1_body: Tinye mmepụta ChatGPT, Claude, ma ọ bụ LLM ọ bụla n'ime igbe ntinye dị n'aka ekpe. Ederede ihe atụ na-egosi ụdị ndị a na-akwado.
howto_step2_body_before: Akụkụ aka nri na-egosi bubble ozi WhatsApp kpọmkwem otú ọ ga-esi pụta na nkata. Gbanwee
howto_step3_body_after: , gaa na WhatsApp, ma mado. A na-edobe bold, italic, strikethrough, inline code, code blocks, na bullet lists.
ref_intro: WhatsApp na-akwado obere setị akara nhazi dị n'ime ahịrị. Markdown nkịtị na-eji delimiters dị iche maka ọtụtụ n'ime ha, nke mere ịmado raw Markdown ji emepụta mmepụta gbajiri agbaji.
faq_a1: WhatsApp na-akwado obere akụkụ nhazi yiri Markdown, mana ọ bụghị CommonMark nkịtị. Ọ na-eji otu akara kpakpando maka bold, otu underscore maka italic, otu tilde maka strikethrough, na backticks atọ maka code. A naghị akwado headings, anchor text nke njikọ, na nested lists.
faq_q2: Kedu ka m ga-esi mee ka ederede bụrụ bold na WhatsApp?
faq_a2_before_code: Kechie ederede ahụ n'otu akara kpakpando:
faq_a2_after_code: . Markdown nkịtị na-eji akara kpakpando abụọ, nke WhatsApp na-egosi dị ka mkpụrụedemede nkịtị.
faq_q3: Kedu ka m ga-esi mee ka ederede bụrụ italic na WhatsApp?
faq_a3_middle: . Italic nke Markdown na-eji otu akara kpakpando (
faq_a3_after_code2: ), nke WhatsApp na-agụ kama dị ka bold — nke na-akpata ọtụtụ nsogbu mgbe a na-amado.
faq_q4: Kedu ka m ga-esi detuo mmepụta ChatGPT ma ọ bụ Claude gaa WhatsApp?
faq_a4: Mmepụta LLM bụ Markdown nkịtị, yabụ ịmado ya ozugbo na-ahapụ akara kpakpando a na-ahụ anya na nhazi gbajiri agbaji. Buru ụzọ gafee ya n'ihe ntụgharị a — ọ na-edegharị bold, italic, ndepụta, na code blocks gaa n'ụdị WhatsApp n'otu pịa.
faq_q5: Ngwa a ọ na-eziga ederede m na server?
faq_a5_before_link: Mba. Ntughari na-arụ ọrụ kpamkpam n'ime browser gị. Ọ dịghị ihe na-apụ n'ibe a. Source dị na
faq_a5_after_link: ma ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ ịchọpụta.
faq_q6: Gịnị mere ịmado Markdown ozugbo n'ime WhatsApp ji yie ihe gbajiri agbaji?
faq_a6: WhatsApp na-eji delimiters dị iche na Markdown. Akara kpakpando abụọ na syntax njikọ nwere brackets na-apụta dị ka mkpụrụedemede nkịtị. Ịtụgharị gaa n'ụdị delimiter otu mkpụrụedemede nke WhatsApp tupu ịmado na-edozi mmepụta ahụ.
faq_q7: Nhazi a ọ na-arụ ọrụ na WhatsApp Web, mobile, na desktop?
faq_a7: Ee. Iwu nhazi WhatsApp kwekọrọ na iOS, Android, WhatsApp Web, na ngwa desktop WhatsApp. Ozi e haziri na otu client na-apụta otu ihe ahụ na ndị ọzọ.
why_h2: Gịnị mere WhatsApp anaghị eji Markdown nkịtị?
why_intro: WhatsApp akọwaghị nhọrọ a n'ihu ọha. Ihe kpatara ya nwere ike ịbụ ngwakọta nke ịdị mfe ide ihe na ekwentị, omenala nkata ndị dị tupu Markdown, na mgbochi mbupu mgbe e mechiri ụdị ahụ.
why_h3_keyboards: Keyboard ekwentị na-eme ka delimiters otu mkpụrụedemede dị mfe
why_p_keyboards_3: . Na ekwentị, akara kpakpando dị n'azụ toggle akara — pịa ugboro anọ maka okwu bold ọ bụla na-abawanye ngwa ngwa. WhatsApp họọrọ
why_p_keyboards_6: : otu mkpụrụedemede n'akụkụ ọ bụla, enweghị mgbagwoju anya n'etiti akara.
why_h3_documents: E wuru Markdown maka akwụkwọ, ọ bụghị bubbles nkata
why_p_documents: Headings, paragraphs, link references, nested lists — ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ na ọ dịghị nke na-adaba nke ọma na ozi dị mkpirikpi. Ịnakwere spec zuru ezu ga-apụta ibubata parser na ọtụtụ edge cases iji jiri atụmatụ anọ.
why_h3_chat: Nkata nwere omenala nke ya mbụ
why_p_chat_1: IRC na ndị ahịa IM mbụ jiri
why_p_chat_3: dị ka shorthand typographic tupu Markdown adị. Slack, Telegram, Discord na Signal niile na-apụ iche na CommonMark n'ụzọ dị iche iche. Ngwa nkata emebeghị ka ya bụrụ ọkọlọtọ n'otu ụdị.
why_p_lockin_1: Ozugbo nhazi ahụ rutere ihe karịrị otu ijeri ndị ọrụ na 2016, ịgbanwe gaa
why_p_lockin_2: ga-emebi ozi ochie ọ bụla mmadụ laghachiri gụọ n'enweghị ịdọ aka ná ntị.
footer_p1_before_lebaux: Ọrụ a bụ open source, onye mere ya bụ
footer_p2_before_link: A na-anabata onyinye nke ukwuu. Ị hụrụ bug? Ụzọ kacha mma isi gosi ya bụ imepe
